cautions: Very low click volume (7 clicks in 90 days). All query-level conclusions are provisional.
Average position (35.0) is deep in SERPs. Most impressions may come from page 2+ where click probability is very low.
GSC position data is averaged over 90 days and may not reflect current rankings.
Theme/intent classification is heuristic-based. Manual SERP verification recommended before acting.
